channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Satellite images provide view inside Iran at war
item.description: Satellite images from commercial companies show the extent of U.S. and Israeli strikes, and how Iran is responding.
item.content:encoded: Satellite images from commercial companies show the extent of U.S. and Israeli strikes, and how Iran is responding.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: Democratic Sen. Mark Warner describes intelligence on Iran
item.description: Sen. Mark Warner, Democrat of Virginia and the ranking member of the Senate Intelligence Committee, talks about his response to U.S. strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: Sen. Mark Warner, Democrat of Virginia and the ranking member of the Senate Intelligence Committee, talks about his response to U.S. strikes on Iran.
item.dc:creator: Emily Kwong

item.title: Iranians in Los Angeles react to the strikes on Iran
item.description: The Iranian diaspora in Los Angeles has celebrated the Trump administration's strikes against Iran, but some have mixed feelings.
item.content:encoded: The Iranian diaspora in Los Angeles has celebrated the Trump administration's strikes against Iran, but some have mixed feelings.
item.dc:creator: Kelly McEvers

item.title: Texas Rep. Tony Gonzales faces primary challenge amid allegations of affair
item.description: Caught in controversy, Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales faces a tough primary challenge as his voters weigh whether to back him again in Tuesday's primary.
item.content:encoded: Caught in controversy, Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales faces a tough primary challenge as his voters weigh whether to back him again in Tuesday's primary.
item.dc:creator: David Martin Davies

item.title: A U.S. scholarship thrills a teacher in India. Then came the soul-crushing questions
item.description: She was thrilled to become the first teacher from a government-sponsored school in India to get a Fulbright exchange award to learn from U.S. schools. People asked two questions that clouded her joy.
item.content:encoded:
She was thrilled to become the first teacher from a government-sponsored school in India to get a Fulbright exchange award to learn from U.S. schools. People asked two questions that clouded her joy.

(Image credit: Anupam Gangopadhyay)
item.dc:creator: Joyeeta Banerjee

item.title: 3 American troops killed, and Trump says more 'likely,' in war against Iran
item.description: The deaths of three U.S. service members mark the first American casualties since the start of operation "Epic Fury" on Saturday. President Trump said "there will likely be more" Americans killed.
item.content:encoded:
The deaths of three U.S. service members mark the first American casualties since the start of operation "Epic Fury" on Saturday. President Trump said "there will likely be more" Americans killed.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: Trump warns Iran not to retaliate after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is killed
item.description: The Iranian government has announced 40 days of mourning. The country's supreme leader was killed following an attack launched by the U.S. and Israel on Saturday against Iran.
item.content:encoded:
The Iranian government has announced 40 days of mourning. The country's supreme leader was killed following an attack launched by the U.S. and Israel on Saturday against Iran.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Daniel Estrin

item.title: 'One year of failure.' The Lancet slams RFK Jr.'s first year as health chief
item.description: In a scathing review, the top US medical journal's editorial board warned that the "destruction that Kennedy has wrought in 1 in office might take generations to repair."
item.content:encoded:
In a scathing review, the top US medical journal's editorial board warned that the "destruction that Kennedy has wrought in 1 in office might take generations to repair."

(Image credit: Ben curtis)
item.dc:creator: Will Stone

item.title: Israel and the U.S. launch strikes on Iran
item.description: We're looking at the strikes in Iran by U.S. and Israel.
item.content:encoded: We're looking at the strikes in Iran by U.S. and Israel.
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: As the U.S. strikes Iran, here's the White House is saying to the American public
item.description: We look at the White House's messaging to the American public on the strikes in Iran.
item.content:encoded: We look at the White House's messaging to the American public on the strikes in Iran.
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon
